steps.title: Match identical lines
steps.content:
A system has infinitely many solutions only when the two equations describe the same line. The given equation is
$$
y=\frac{3}{7}x+5
$$
So the second equation must have the same slope and the same $y$-intercept.

steps.title: Read the intercept
steps.content: In $y=mx+b$, the constant $b$ is the $y$-intercept. Matching the given line requires $$ b=5 $$ The answer is D.
